text:
**Noise removed:**
- `[â†’relay]` / `[relayâś—]` lines now go to `relay.log` only; they appear on stdout only at `RUST_LOG=tenex_edge=debug` [...]    - **`src/relay_log.rs`**
     - Changed `log_entry` to route through `tracing::debug!("{line}")` instead of `eprintln!`, still writes timestamped line to relay.log file
     - Effect: relay event lines (previously noisy `[â†’relay]` unformatted stderr) now only show with `RUST_LOG=tenex_edge=debug`
